review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --output-format json < staged diff prompt > /tmp/cp00-117-claude-review-output-valid.json

findings.title: Audit-hint sanitization is inherited from CP116 without independent re-filtering in CP117
findings.evidence: createPermissionKernelCp117UiStateSnapshot spreads ...inheritedSurface.audit_hint_display from createPermissionKernelCp116UiPermissionAuditBindingSurface and forces preview_only/emitted_to_audit_ledger/hidden_field_names_exposed flags, but does not re-apply an allowlist to the hint contents itself. The 4 hidden source fields are verifiably dropped (authz.test.js injects privileged_note/cross_tenant_secret/internal_policy_label/sealed_audit_hint_payload and asserts undefined; the validator repeats the injection), so the in-scope guarantee holds. Suppression of any other arbitrary caller-supplied hint key relies entirely on CP116's allowlist behavior.
findings.recommendation: Acceptable as designed for a synthetic, metadata-only Risk A pack. For defense-in-depth, consider re-projecting the hint onto the explicit allowlist (actor_id, action, tenant_id, matter_id, effect, reason) inside CP117 so the no-leak guarantee does not depend solely on upstream CP116.

parsed_review.rationale: Contract bumps to v0.11 and moves current_pack to CP00-117 (Risk A, 10 units, range RP02.P04.M05.S18-RP02.P04.M06.S05, flag permission_kernel_ui_evidence_state_snapshot_verified) with a complete ui_evidence_state_snapshot_pack section that the validator cross-checks against the JS contract (surfaces, exports, state_ids, shape, data-dependency sources, hidden_source_fields, no_write_attestation). All 10 in-scope surfaces are present and correctly typed (hermes_evidence 1, claude_review 1, implementation 3, ui 5; 2 micro phases; first S18, last M06.S05). CP116 inheritance is genuine (imports CP116 contract/surface/manifest/matrix; inherited_ui_permission_audit_contract_id and hidden_source_fields sourced from CP116). Security invariants are enforced and tested: permission badges force grants_access:false, denied_state sets secondary_interaction_enabled:false and grants_access:false with deny effect, audit hints are preview_only with emitted_to_audit_ledger:false, hidden source fields are denied in the data-dependency map and omitted from hint/error/state surfaces (verified by injection), and unauthorized counts are not_collected/not rendered/not exposed. The pack is pure frozen metadata with no fs/network/DB/AI imports; the no_write_attestation and per-snapshot flags assert no runtime UI/API route, no policy mutation, no audit/product/database writes, no idempotency/lock persistence, no export/share, no AI retrieval, and no LDIP. HRX remains embedded-only and handoff is fixed to CP00-118 / RP02.P04.M06.S06 (contiguous after CP116's S17). The single P3 is a non-blocking defense-in-depth observation.
